        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {node['color']}: pixels={node['pixels']}, bbox=[{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}]")

# Check the merged shape area
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nShape region (cols 23-38):")
for r in range(14, 25):
    print(f"  Row {r}: '{ascii_lines[r][23:38]}'")

print("\nYellow L-shape region:")
for r in range(44, 55):
    print(f"  Row {r}: '{ascii_lines[r][49:61]}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
